Update ServiceNow Incident

Name *
Update ServiceNow Incident

Tool
Update ServiceNow Incident

Description
Updates the category, subcategory and the assignee of a
ServiceNow incident.

Assignee (string)
Assignee Email address ×

IncidentID (string)
The ID of ServiceNow Incident, do not use Incid... ×

Category (string)
The Category of ServiceNow Incident ×

Subcategory (string)
The Subcategory of ServiceNow Incident ×
extraction.description: This screenshot shows the UiPath Agent Builder tool configuration panel for the ServiceNow tool named "Update ServiceNow Incident." The tool’s name, disabled tool selector, and description are visible, along with configured argument description chips for Assignee, IncidentID, Category, and Subcategory. The UI indicates the tool has already been configured with descriptive metadata for each string input.
extraction.step_instructions: Informational screenshot — no user action required. It shows the completed configuration for the Update ServiceNow Incident tool, with argument descriptions filled in for Assignee, IncidentID, Category, and Subcategory.
